sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84855" key="poluqa/htos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-θάητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολυθέατος, τέμενος</foreign> Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:3:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.3.14</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
